issues.title: Real-time WebSocket feed for live floor events
issues.description: Establish a WS channel that pushes new events to connected dashboard clients within 500ms of sensor ingestion. Backpressure strategy TBD.

issues.title: Room quiet badge disappears after browser refresh
issues.description: Quiet status derived from client-side timer; on refresh the initial state is unknown until the next WS message arrives.

issues.title: Night-mode alert suppression rules (10 PM – 6 AM)
issues.description: Between configurable night hours, suppress non-critical motion alerts to avoid waking staff for expected nighttime movement.

issues.title: Write runbook: on-call response for fall alerts
issues.description: Document escalation steps, expected response SLA, and who to page for confirmed fall events vs. sensor anomalies.

issues.title: Export resident report as PDF — weekly summary
issues.description: Generate a one-page weekly summary PDF per resident: fall count, avg walk score, alert history. Triggered manually from the Reports tab.

issues.title: Analytics chart renders blank on Safari 17
issues.description: The SVG path gradient in analytics breaks on Safari 17 due to a linearGradient scoping bug. Fix: move gradientUnits to userSpaceOnUse.

issues.title: Add Datadog APM spans to ingestion pipeline
issues.description: Instrument the sensor-to-event pipeline with Datadog APM. Key spans: ingest, dedup, enrich, persist, notify.

issues.title: v1.2 Auth — role-based access (admin / nurse / viewer)
issues.description: Full RBAC rollout: three roles, JWT claims, middleware enforcement on all protected routes.

issues.title: Login redirect loop when session token expires mid-nav
issues.description: Expired token during a client-side navigation caused an infinite redirect. Fixed with token refresh interception in middleware.

issues.title: Floor map — drag-to-reorder room cards
issues.description: Nurse staff can reorder floor map rooms to match physical layout. Order persisted per-user in localStorage.

issues.title: Upgrade Next.js 14 → 15 and resolve breaking changes
issues.description: Updated Next.js, fixed async params usage, migrated cookies() calls to the new API surface.
